Germantown, MD

Tracks Contact

Key Dates

March 3 – April 11, 2026

Hack the Planet

GenAI Virtual Track

In-Person Demo Day

RaptorHacks runs from March 3 through April 11, 2026. The GenAI virtual track opens first, with MVP + demo video submissions due by March 22. The top 3 present at the AI Faculty Showcase. All other tracks culminate at Demo Day on April 11 at the GT campus.

Key Dates

March 3 — Hackathon opens

March 5 — Networking and Team Building


March 22 — GenAI virtual submissions due


April 11 — Demo Day (all tracks)

Location

GT Campus, Germantown



Includes

Keynote, Judging, Prizes, Free Lunch, Swag
